item.title: weaviate / weaviate
item.description:
Desc: Weaviate is an open source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for combining vector search with structured filtering with the fault-tolerance and scalability of a cloud-native database, all accessible through GraphQL, REST, and various language clients.
Lang: Go
Star: 6710
